title: Tech Trends — Talking About Innovation
description: Vocabulary for discussing AI, startups, remote work, and emerging technologies.
summary_pt_br: Vocabulário de tech: disrupt, trend, impact, early days. Linguagem pra discutir inovação.

scenes.subtitle_en: Vocabulary for discussing AI, startups, remote work, and emerging technologies.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Vocabulário de tech: disrupt, trend, impact, early days. Linguagem pra discutir inovação.

scenes.text_en: Vocabulary for discussing AI, startups, remote work, and emerging technologies. Today's focus: tech trends — talking about innovation. AI is disrupting almost every industry right now.
scenes.text_pt: Vocabulário de tech: disrupt, trend, impact, early days. Linguagem pra discutir inovação. Foco de hoje: tech trends — talking about innovation. A IA está transformando quase todos os setores.

scenes.title: Tech Trends — Talking About Innovation
scenes.body_en: Useful phrases: 'X is disrupting the industry.', 'We're seeing a trend toward Y.', 'The impact of AI on jobs is...', 'It's still early days for...'
scenes.body_pt: Vocabulário de tech: disrupt, trend, impact, early days. Linguagem pra discutir inovação.

examples.en: AI is disrupting almost every industry right now.
examples.pt: A IA está transformando quase todos os setores.

examples.en: We're seeing a clear trend toward remote work.
examples.pt: Há uma tendência clara rumo ao trabalho remoto.

examples.en: The impact of automation on jobs is significant.
examples.pt: O impacto da automação nos empregos é significativo.

scenes.title: Key vocabulary — Tech Trends — Talking About Innovation

exercise.question: Complete: "AI is ___ almost every industry right now."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "AI is disrupting almost every industry right now."
exercise.hint_pt_br: A IA está transformando quase todos os setores.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
We're seeing a clear trend toward remote work.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "We're seeing a clear trend toward remote work."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Há uma tendência clara rumo ao trabalho remoto.

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Tech Trends — Talking About Innovation — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre tech trends — talking about innovation. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What's your take on AI in the software industry?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: AI is disrupting how we write code.
turns.pt_hint: A IA tá mudando como programamos.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Do you think it replaces developers?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: It changes our role but doesn't replace us.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What's the biggest trend you see in startups?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Remote-first companies are winning talent globally.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Is Silicon Valley still the center of innovation?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: It's still early days for this shift.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What skill will matter most in five years?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Knowing how to work with AI tools.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Same answer from every CEO I've talked to.

scenes.title: A tech podcast episode
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize Joca's predictions about tech. Use at least three tech vocabulary words.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: On a Tuesday night, Joca joined a small tech podcast recorded from a home studio in São Paulo.

paragraphs.speaker: Host
paragraphs.en: Joca, what trend are you most excited about right now?

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: AI is disrupting software development faster than any shift I've ever seen.

paragraphs.speaker: Host
paragraphs.en: Do you worry it will replace entry-level programmers?

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: It changes our role, but creativity and judgment still matter enormously.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: The episode ended with the same conclusion most tech podcasts reached that year — adapt, or be adapted.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Tech Trends — Talking About Innovation". Vocabulary for discussing AI, startups, remote work, and emerging technologies. AI is disrupting almost every industry right now. We're seeing a clear trend toward remote work. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Tech Trends — Talking About Innovation". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year
check.explanation: She says: "Tech Trends — Talking About Innovation".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Tech Trends — Talking About Innovation".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.
